---
title: "Geostatistics: Random Fields, Kriging, and the SPDE Approach"
subtitle: "Track B — Geospatial"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Geostatistics: Random Fields, Kriging, and the SPDE Approach

**Track**: Track B — Geospatial

The theory of spatially correlated data on continuous domains. Covers random field theory, variogram estimation, kriging, model-based geostatistics, and the modern SPDE approach linking spatial statistics to PDEs and finite elements.

## Table of Contents

1. Random Fields: Stationarity and Covariance
2. Covariance Models: The Matérn Family
3. Variogram Estimation and Model Fitting
4. Kriging: Optimal Spatial Prediction
5. Model-Based Geostatistics
6. The SPDE Approach to Spatial Modeling
7. Spatial Simulation
8. Large-Scale Spatial Data: Approximations and Modern Methods

---

## Chapter 1: Random Fields: Stationarity and Covariance

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Covariance Models: The Matérn Family

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Variogram Estimation and Model Fitting

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Kriging: Optimal Spatial Prediction

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Model-Based Geostatistics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: The SPDE Approach to Spatial Modeling

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Spatial Simulation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Large-Scale Spatial Data: Approximations and Modern Methods

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
